title: The Weekly Challenge - 179
task1_desc: You are given a positive number, `$n`.
task1_body: You are given a positive number, `$n`. Write a script to spell the ordinal number. For example, 11 => eleventh 62 => sixty-second 99 => ninety-ninth
task2_desc: You are given a list of positive numbers, `@n`.
task2_body:
You are given a list of positive numbers, `@n`. Write a script to print sparkline in Unicode for the given list of numbers.
Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 28th August 2022**.
